list.title: AssociationAPI

list.description: This function is used to get the contacts that fall under an organization.

list.description: This function is used to get the organizations that fall under the association associated with the access token.

list.title: V2
list.description: This class is used to interact with the TidyHQ V2 API.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI
list.description: This class is used to interact with Contacts in TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#createContact
list.description: Creates a new contact with the given data in TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#createContactNote
list.description: Adds a note to a specified contact.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#deleteContactNote
list.description: Deletes a specified note from a specified contact.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#getContact
list.description: This function is used to get a single contact from TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#getContactMemberships
list.description: Gets all memberships for a given single contact.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#getContacts
list.description: This function is used to get a list of contacts from TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_ContactsAPI#updateContact
list.description: This function is used to update a contact in TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_MembershipAPI
list.description: This class is used to interact with Memberships in TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_OrganizationAPI
list.description: This class is used to interact with Organizations in TidyHQ.

list.title: V2_OrganizationAPI#getAdmins
list.description: Returns all admins configured / provisioned for the current organization.

list.title: V2_OrganizationAPI#getOrganization
list.description: Returns the organization the current token is associated with.

list.title: V2_OrganizationAPI#getRoles
list.description: Returns all roles configured / provisioned for the current organization.

list.description: This function is used to delete a Webhook.

list.description: This function is used to get a Webhook by its ID.

list.title: V2_WebhooksAPI#getWebhooks
list.description: This function is used to get a list of all Webhooks.

list.description: This function is used to authorize using a username and password.
